Operation 'updateStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Current description is vague about what inputs are required and what the operation returns. It lacks clarity about side effects and downstream impacts. The phrase 'used internally' is unclear for AI agents determining when to invoke this operation. Improved description specifies the request schema context (application ID, status, metadata), clarifies the response (confirmation of delivery), and explains important side effects (partner notifications and potential downstream processes) to help AI agents understand the full operational impact.

data.current_description: Forward status updates for loan applications to partners. Used internally to notify partners of application status changes.
data.description_suggestion: Notify partners of loan application status changes. Forwards status updates for loan applications to configured partner systems. Accepts application status notifications including application ID, status, and metadata. Returns confirmation of successful notification delivery. This operation triggers partner notifications and may initiate downstream processes based on the status change (e.g., document requests, approval notifications).
data.reasoning: Current description is vague about what inputs are required and what the operation returns. It lacks clarity about side effects and downstream impacts. The phrase 'used internally' is unclear for AI agents determining when to invoke this operation. Improved description specifies the request schema context (application ID, status, metadata), clarifies the response (confirmation of delivery), and explains important side effects (partner notifications and potential downstream processes) to help AI agents understand the full operational impact.

message: Operation 'verifyAuthentication' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Current description lacks actionable details about inputs (which token is being verified), outputs (what validation result is returned), and practical use cases. The phrase 'test if' is passive and unclear for AI agents. Improved description clarifies that the operation validates the current authentication token, specifies the expected output (validation result with status and TTL), and provides context about when AI agents should invoke this operation (before critical operations or to determine refresh necessity). This enhances AI agent interpretability and decision-making.

data.current_description: Test if the authentication token is still valid and has not expired.
data.description_suggestion: Validate the current authentication token's validity and expiration status. Verifies that the provided API authentication token is still valid and has not expired. Returns validation result indicating token status (valid/expired) and remaining time-to-live if applicable. Use this operation to check token health before executing critical operations or to determine if token refresh is required.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks actionable details about inputs (which token is being verified), outputs (what validation result is returned), and practical use cases. The phrase 'test if' is passive and unclear for AI agents. Improved description clarifies that the operation validates the current authentication token, specifies the expected output (validation result with status and TTL), and provides context about when AI agents should invoke this operation (before critical operations or to determine refresh necessity). This enhances AI agent interpretability and decision-making.

Operation 'updateStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Current description is vague about what inputs are required and what the operation returns. It lacks clarity on the operation's effects and doesn't provide sufficient context for AI agents to determine when to use this operation. Improved description specifies required inputs (application ID, status information), clarifies the action (notifies partners and updates status record), and explains the return value. This enables AI agents to better understand the operation's purpose, prerequisites, and outcomes.

data.current_description: Forward status updates for loan applications to partners. Used internally to notify partners of application status changes.
data.description_suggestion: Notify partners of loan application status changes. Forwards status updates for a specified loan application to configured partner systems. Requires the application ID and new status information in the request. This operation triggers partner notifications and updates the application's status record. Returns confirmation of the status update notification.
data.reasoning: Current description is vague about what inputs are required and what the operation returns. Improved description specifies required inputs (application ID, status information), clarifies the action (notifies partners and updates status record), and explains the return value. message: Operation 'verifyAuthentication' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Current description explains the purpose but lacks clarity on what the operation returns and when an AI agent should use it. The improved description specifies the return value (boolean or status), provides use cases (validating before sensitive operations, refreshing state), and clarifies the operation's role in the authentication workflow. This enables AI agents to better understand the operation's outputs and determine when authentication verification is necessary.

data.current_description: Test if the authentication token is still valid and has not expired.
data.description_suggestion: Verify the authentication token is valid and active. Tests whether the provided authentication token is still valid and has not expired. Returns a boolean or status indicating token validity. Use this operation to validate authentication before performing sensitive operations or to refresh authentication state.
data.reasoning: Current description explains the purpose but lacks clarity on what the operation returns and when an AI agent should use it.
